text.tspan: provided. Requires `is_html=True` if the body contains HTML. For attachments, │
you must provide a FileUploadable object with valid `s3key` (obtained from a │
previous file download action like GMAIL_GET_ATTACHMENT), `mimetype` (e.g., │
including PNG, JPG, PDF, MP4, etc. are supported. Gmail API limits total │
message size to ~25 MB after base64 encoding. │
│ cc array optional "Carbon Copy (CC) recipients' email │
│ bcc array optional "Blind Carbon Copy (BCC) recipients' │
│ body string optional "Email content (plain text or HTML). │
│ is_html boolean optional "Set to `True` if the email body │
│ subject string optional "Subject line of the email. Either │
│ user_id string optional "User's email address; the literal 'me' │
│ attachment object optional "File to attach. FileUploadable object │
│ from_email string optional "Sender email address for the 'From' │
│ recipient_email string optional "Primary recipient's email address. You │
